name: The Bear And The Admiral
short_description: Run and gun through hand-drawn, cartoon worlds, brimming with monsters and aliens... And save the Solar System with the Bear & The Admiral!
detailed_description:
The residents of the Solar System have been frozen in Staseo Magnesius!! The Bear And The Admiral is a 2-D Platformer/ Run and Gun game with a bright cartoony art style.

Journey through 6 weird worlds with over 50 levels and a dozen boss fights and save the day.

Play as the Bear or the Admiral in single player or local co-op (a controller is required for local multiplayer) as you battle bizarre enemies with an array of weapons and pickups including jet-packs, pogo sticks and bouncy grenades.
about_the_game:

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
